name: a6_agent_sdk_hook
description: A6 — the agent SDK / Claude Code hook path. A report shaped exactly like throughlog.agent_sdk.build_report() (and the Claude Code hook) POSTs through the same ingest -> gate -> bus as any source. It lands as a validated AGENT_REPORT in the persisted log, carrying the agent identity and the prose that will appear in the diary. Proves the wedge's intake contract through the REAL bus, not a mock.

payload.summary: Claude Code Edit: categorize.py — added the AGENT_REPORT signal branch
